reforms.description: The government introduced special labour market measures aimed at reducing unemployment in the short run and encouraging restructuring and innovation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: These measures are designed to stimulate economic activity and support innovative restructuring, which can enhance productivity and employment.
reforms.status_evidence: The government presented measures to stimulate economic activity, including special labour market measures.
reforms.importance_rationale: These measures represent a significant effort to address unemployment and promote innovation, though they are not a structural overhaul of the system.
reforms.source_quote: Special labour market measures (Kr.400 million) to reduce unemployment in the short run and to encourage restructuring and innovation.
